subcodes.first_line: O Mohsen! Hearken unto the Call of the Wronged One. Verily, He hath come with the Truth from the heaven of might by His Own Will, which no hosts can hinder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محسن اسمع ندآء المظلوم انه اتی بالحق من سماء الاقتدار باختیار لاتمنعه جنود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
